---
title: "Exploration du texte avec edstr_view()"

format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Exploration adu texte vec edstr_view()}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  
knitr:
  opts_knit: 
    root.dir: home/edjulien/CRPV
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: "#>"
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false

editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false 

library(edstr)
```

Test `edstr_view`
